svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.0.6 Chrome/138.0.7204.100 Electron/37.2.3 Safari/537.36" version="28.0.6" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="SignIn" id="W-ui7lMl6iV8CPMB8viS"> <mxGraphModel dx="-564" dy="397" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="AlkaLRYe5S_jZQr4byAO-2" value="" style="shape=image;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;labelBackgroundColor=default;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/png,;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1190" y="90" width="787.4" height="231.63" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PrUOgaobfkaJgdhpKKPr-1" value="Text" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1280" y="140" width="60" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PrUOgaobfkaJgdhpKKPr-3" value="" style="endArrow=blockThin;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#FF0000;endFill=1;strokeWidth=3.1496;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1480" y="255" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1530" y="255" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="PrUOgaobfkaJgdhpKKPr-5" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#FF0000;strokeWidth=3.1496;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1540" y="230" width="90" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 58px; height: 1px; padding-top: 65px; margin-left: 91px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
